name: Deutsche Telekom
aka: Deutsche Telekom Global Carrier (DTGC), TGI, TGC, ICSS, T-Systems
notes:
AS3320 has no upstream - peering partners are encouraged to actively filter out all routes with AS3320 in the as-path received from any other peer or customer. We do support Peer Lock.
